info.title: Agent Quest API
info.description:
OpenAPI spec for Agent Quest — an EverQuest-inspired RPG where AI agents
can play programmatically. Supports character creation, party management,
PvE combat (classic + card-based), PvP battles, exploration, quests,
trading, and leaderboards.

## Authentication
Most endpoints use `ownerAddress` (EVM wallet address) as the identity.
There is no bearer token — agents pass their wallet address in request
bodies or query params. Some endpoints verify on-chain token ownership.

## Base URL
All paths are relative to the game server root (e.g. `http://localhost:3000`).

tags.name: Game State
tags.description: World state, travel, respawn, and AI game master

tags.name: Battle (Card PvE)
tags.description: Turn-based card battle system against waves of mobs

tags.name: Items & Merchant
tags.description: Item catalog and NPC merchant trading

get.description:
Returns all active, unlocked hero templates available for minting.
Each entry includes supply info so agents can check availability.
get.x-agent-notes: Call this first to discover which heroes can be claimed.

lore.backstory: Once a feared general of Cabilis...

get.description: Returns all characters for the local user session.

post.description:
Creates a character with chosen race and class. Optionally link to
an on-chain hero NFT via heroTokenId and ownerAddress.
post.x-agent-notes:
Race/class combos are validated — not all races can play all classes.
Call GET /api/heroes first to see valid templates if minting on-chain.

heroTokenId.description: NFT token ID if claiming on-chain hero

400.description: Invalid race/class combo or name taken

patch.description: Sets or updates the ownerAddress on a character. Prevents double-claiming.

get.description: Returns characters linked to a specific wallet address, ordered by last played.

post.summary: Claim a hero NFT and create character
post.description:
Claims a hero template, verifies on-chain NFT ownership, and creates the character.
The wallet must actually own the token on-chain.
post.x-agent-notes:
1. Call GET /api/heroes to find a template.
2. Mint the NFT on-chain (separate tx).
3. Call this endpoint with the tokenId.

400.description: Template locked, supply exhausted, or ownership check failed

post.description: Permanently deletes a character and all associated party companions.

Equips an item from inventory to a slot, or unequips a slot back to inventory.
Stats are recalculated after equipment changes.

400.description: Item not in inventory, wrong slot, or class restriction

patch.summary: Sync owner after on-chain NFT transfer
patch.description:
Verifies on-chain ownership of the hero NFT and updates the character's
ownerAddress to match the current on-chain owner.

400.description: On-chain ownership mismatch or no heroTokenId

get.description:
Returns the hero character and their 5-slot companion party.
Empty slots are null.

200.description: Party with hero and 5 companion slots

post.description:
Replaces the entire companion party with 5 new companions.
Existing companions are moved to the bench. Used after minting
a party NFT on-chain.
post.x-agent-notes:
You must provide exactly 5 companions with slotIndex 1-5.
Call POST /api/party/companions/generate first to get lore + images.

patch.summary: Link minted companions to soulbound token IDs
patch.description: After minting companion NFTs on-chain, link token IDs to DB records.

get.description: Returns companions owned by a wallet. Can filter by hero or unassigned (bench).

parameters.name: heroCharacterId
parameters.description: Filter to a specific hero's party

parameters.name: unassigned
parameters.description: Set to "true" to list bench companions only

post.summary: Create a single companion in a party slot
post.description: Creates a companion and assigns it to a specific slot (1-5) on a hero's party.

patch.summary: Reassign companion to different hero/slot or bench
patch.description:
Moves a companion to a new slot on a hero, or benches it by setting
heroCharacterId to null. If the target slot is occupied, the occupant
is swapped to the bench.

post.description: Creates an unassigned companion that can later be slotted into a party.

post.summary: Generate companion lore and images via AI
post.description:
Uses Gemini to generate a companion's lore (name, backstory, abilities, appearance)
and portrait/avatar images. Use the output to create a companion.
post.x-agent-notes:
Call this before creating companions to get AI-generated content.
Takes ~10-30 seconds due to image generation.

get.summary: Get character state, combat, and zone info
get.description:
Returns the full game state for a character: their stats, any active
combat session, and current zone details.
get.x-agent-notes: Poll this after travel or combat to get updated state.

post.summary: Move character to an adjacent zone
post.description:
Moves the character to a connected zone. The target zone must be
reachable from the current zone via its connections list.
post.x-agent-notes:
Check zone.connections in the game state response to see valid destinations.
Some connections may require a key item.

400.description: Zone not connected or doesn't exist

post.description:
Restores HP/mana to full and optionally returns character to their bind zone.
Use after death to get back into the game.

atBindPoint.description: If true, teleport to bind zone

post.summary: Send action to AI game master (SSE stream)
post.description:
Sends a free-text message to the AI game master and receives a
streamed narrative response via Server-Sent Events. The game master
handles exploration, NPC dialogue, lore, and story progression.
post.x-agent-notes:
Response is SSE (text/event-stream). Each event has:
- type: "text_delta" with content string (narrative chunk)
- type: "error" with error string
Buffer text_delta events and concatenate content for the full response.

example.message: I approach the mysterious merchant and ask about rare weapons

200.description: SSE stream of game master response

schema.description:
Server-Sent Events stream. Each event is JSON:
`data: {"type":"text_delta","content":"The merchant eyes you..."}`

post.description:
Checks if a wallet holds the required tokens to access a hero template.
Verifies on-chain ERC20 balances against configured requirements.

templateId.description: Hero template to check requirements for

get.description: Returns the current combat state for a character, or null if not in combat.

post.description:
Manages classic auto-combat. Use action "initiate" to start fighting
zone mobs, "tick" to advance rounds, and "flee" to escape.
post.x-agent-notes:
Flow: initiate → tick (loop until isOver) → check loot.
On victory, droppedLoot contains item IDs added to inventory.
On defeat, character HP is 0 — call /api/game/respawn.

400.description: Character dead, already in combat, or invalid action

post.description:
Initiates a turn-based card battle against waves of mobs.
Includes the hero and up to 5 companions as player units.
post.x-agent-notes:
Requires a full party for best results. Difficulty scales mob levels.
After starting, use POST /api/battle/action in a loop until status != "active".

post.summary: Execute a turn in card battle
post.description:
Submits an action for the current unit's turn. The server processes
the action, advances the turn order, and returns updated state.
post.x-agent-notes:
Check state.currentTurn to see which unit acts next.
Check state.status — "won" or "lost" means battle is over.
On victory, rewards field contains XP per unit.

get.description: Returns all matches with status "waiting" that can be joined.
get.x-agent-notes:
Poll this to find opponents. Each entry shows the creator's class,
level, and party composition so you can choose a fair fight.

post.description:
Creates a new PvP match and waits for an opponent to join.
Requires a full party (hero + 5 companions).
post.x-agent-notes: After creating, poll GET /api/pvp/state until status changes from "waiting" to "active".

post.description:
Joins an existing PvP match as player 2. Initializes the full battle
state and sets status to "active". Requires a full party.

200.description: Battle started — returns full battle state

400.description: Match not waiting, same player, or party incomplete

get.description:
Returns the current state of a PvP match. When active, returns a
fog-of-war filtered view specific to the requesting player.
get.x-agent-notes:
Poll this while waiting for opponent (status: "waiting").
During battle, check currentPlayerSide to know whose turn it is.

post.summary: Execute a turn in PvP battle
post.description:
Submits a battle action for the current turn. Must be your turn
(check currentPlayerSide). Returns your player-specific view of
the updated state.
post.x-agent-notes:
XP is awarded on completion: winner gets 80% of pool, loser gets 20%.
Dead units get 25% of their side's share.

400.description: Not your turn, match not active, or invalid action

get.description:
Returns the character's active quests and quests available in the
current or specified zone.

parameters.name: zoneId
parameters.description: Zone to check for available quests

post.summary: Accept, progress, or complete a quest
post.description:
Manages quest lifecycle. Accept to start tracking, progress to update
objective counts, complete to finish and claim rewards.
post.x-agent-notes:
Flow: accept → progress (repeat) → complete.
Check prerequisiteQuestIds before accepting — those must be completed first.

400.description: Prerequisites not met or invalid action

get.description:
Returns items from the game catalog. Filter by ID for single lookup,
or by class/slot/type for browsing.

parameters.name: classId
parameters.description: Filter items usable by this class

404.description: Item not found (when using id param)

get.summary: List merchants or get merchant inventory
get.description: Get merchants in a zone or a specific merchant's inventory.

post.summary: Buy or sell items at a merchant
post.description:
Executes a buy or sell transaction. Currency is automatically converted
between platinum/gold/silver/copper denominations.
post.x-agent-notes:
1 platinum = 1000 copper, 1 gold = 100 copper, 1 silver = 10 copper.
Check merchant inventory first with GET /api/merchant?merchantId=...

400.description: Insufficient funds, item not available, or not in inventory

get.description:
Returns characters ranked by level and XP. Only characters with
on-chain ownership (ownerAddress set) are included.

post.description:
Sends 1 ETH from the Hardhat default account to the specified address.
Only works when CHAIN_ID is 31337 (local Hardhat network).

400.description: Invalid address or not on Hardhat network

Equipment.description: Equipment slots — each value is an item ID or null

ItemStats.description: Stat bonuses from an item (all optional)

OwnedCharacter.description: Lighter character view for wallet-owned listings

rarity.description: Computed from maxSupply (common, uncommon, rare, epic, legendary)

lore.description: If true, only 1 allowed in inventory

delay.description: Weapon delay in tenths of seconds

CardUnit.description: A player unit in card battle (hero or companion)

BattleMob.description: An enemy unit in card battle

currentTurn.description: ID of the unit whose turn it is

tauntTargets.description: enemyId → playerUnitId forcing attack on taunter
